startApp.title: Discover the world of coffee
startApp.subtitle: From bean to cup, learn everything about coffee and making the perfect cup.

requestResetCode.title: Forgot password
requestResetCode.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a code to reset your password.

verifyResetCode.title: Verify your Reset Code
verifyResetCode.subtitle: We have sent an 8-digit code to your email address. Enter it below.

currentBehaviour.title: How do you usually buy or drink your coffee?
currentBehaviour.subtitle: This helps us understand your starting point.

experienceLevel.title: What is your coffee experience?
experienceLevel.subtitle: We tailor your learning path based on what you already know.

optionDescriptions.tasteEnjoyer: I drink coffee mainly for the taste and socializing. I'm a beginner.
optionDescriptions.curious: I have heard terms like grind size, extraction or roast profiles before.
optionDescriptions.connoisseur: I actively experiment with variables, brew methods and specialty coffee.

goal.title: What would you like to achieve?
goal.subtitle: Choose your main goal. Don't worry, we cover everything, but we prioritize this.

optionLabels.tastingSkills: I want to recognize, describe and discover unique coffee flavors.
optionLabels.perfectEspresso: I want to learn how to dial in and brew the perfect espresso.
optionLabels.latteArt: I want to master milk texture and create beautiful latte art.
optionLabels.beanToCup: I want to understand the entire process, from green bean plantation to roasting.

currentPreferences.title: What kind of flavor profile do you prefer?
currentPreferences.subtitle: Are you into dark, sweet classics or light, juicy fruits?

optionLabels.boldClassic: Strong, intense and full-bodied flavors with deep, chocolatey notes.
optionLabels.milkBalanced: A smooth balance between rich and sweet, creamy milk texturing.
optionLabels.fruityAcidic: Light, floral and fruity flavors with a refreshing acidity.
optionLabels.versatile: I want to experience and explore the specialty coffee flavors.

desiredTempo.title: What is your pace?
desiredTempo.subtitle: How much time do you want to spend on your daily coffee journey?

optionDescriptions.quickShot: Fast and strong, teach me the absolute essentials.
optionDescriptions.dailyRoutine: I take time for a short lesson while drinking my morning coffee.
optionDescriptions.weekendLover: On the weekend I love to dive deeply into the learning material.
optionDescriptions.ownPace: No fixed schedule, I prefer to browse at my own pace.

currentMethodes.title: Which brewing methods do you currently use?
currentMethodes.subtitle: Select the methods you have equipment for.

extraGear.title: What extra gear is available in your kitchen?
extraGear.subtitle: Select the tools you already own.

success.title: Your Roadmap is Ready!
success.description: We've tailored the perfect theory course for your coffee setup.

chapterUnlocked.title: Chapter 1 Unlocked!
chapterUnlocked.description: It's time to dive into the fundamentals.

start.title: Ready to Learn?
start.description: Discover the science behind your perfect cup.

about.title: About BrewLingo
about.content: BrewLingo is your ultimate guide to discovering the world of coffee. From bean to cup, learn everything about coffee and making the perfect cup. Developed by Sam Hoeterickx.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content: Your privacy is important to us. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the BrewLingo app. We do not share your data with third parties.

termsOfCondition.title: Terms of Condition
termsOfCondition.content: By using the BrewLingo app, you agree to these terms of condition. The content provided in this app is for educational purposes. We reserve the right to modify or terminate the service at any time.

quitConfirm.title: Are you sure?
quitConfirm.subtitle: All progress in this lesson will be lost.

completed.title: Great Job!
completed.subtitle: Reviewing your knowledge is the key to mastery.
